title: 抢占与请求生命周期回流

execution.environment: host (纯单元测试，不 import vllm/CUDA — 精简版自包含)

behavior_alignment_against_real_vllm.note: 不止测精简版自洽 — 逐条比对真实 vLLM 源码（pin f3fef123），确认精简版是只做减法的忠实子集。

verified.behavior: FCFS LIFO 抢占：分配失败 → self.running.pop() 抢 RUNNING 末尾
verified.source: vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L466-L510 (while True 抢占块, FCFS 走 L504 running.pop())

verified.behavior: 抢占终止：preempted_req == request 则 break
_preempt_request 副作用：free KV / status→PREEMPTED / num_computed_tokens=0 / 清 spec / num_preemptions++ / waiting.prepend_request
verified.match: exact (encoder_cache.free / record_event 已按 SUBTRACTED 删除)

verified.behavior: WAITING 守卫：本拍发生抢占 (not preempted_reqs) 就完全跳过 WAITING
verified.match: exact (_pause_state==UNPAUSED 正确 SUBTRACTED, not preempted_reqs 守卫保留)

verified.behavior: 双队列防队头阻塞：_is_blocked_waiting_status / _enqueue 路由 / _select FCFS skipped 优先
verified.match: exact (PRIORITY 比较分支 L1571-L1577 正确 SUBTRACTED)

verified.behavior: 回流落点：WAITING→scheduled_new_reqs / PREEMPTED→scheduled_resumed_reqs / else raise
check_stop token 级停止 + 优先级：min_tokens 门 → EOS → stop_token_ids(set stop_reason) → length。EOS 优先于 length(同 token STOPPED 而非 LENGTH_CAPPED)
verified.match: exact (repetition_detection 分支正确 SUBTRACTED, 恒 None 不触发)

verified.behavior: _update_request_with_output：逐 token append + check_stop + 停止后 del new_token_ids[num_new:] 截断
spec 回退：num_rejected = num_draft - (len(generated)-1)，num_computed_tokens / num_output_placeholders 在 >0 时各回扣 num_rejected
停止分流 + 批量摘除：stopped_running_reqs → remove_all(running); stopped_preempted_reqs → waiting.remove_requests
AsyncScheduler._update_request_with_output：discard_latest_async_tokens → 返回 [] 并复位; placeholder 随实际 token 数回扣; RUNNING 才 cache_blocks

scope_caveat_honored: 标题中的 'stop string' 在 scheduler 侧仅指 stop_token_ids/EOS/length 等 token 级停止；字符串子串匹配 (check_stop_strings) 属前端 detokenizer (ch09)，精简版 check_stop 未杜撰任何字符串级逻辑 — 与 dossier scope_caveat_stop_string 一致。
summary: 28/28 单元测试全过；lint_fidelity 无 BLOCKING；11 项核心可观察行为逐条比对真实 vLLM 源码(pin f3fef123)确认为只做减法的忠实子集（抢占循环/抢占副作用/WAITING 守卫/双队列/回流落点/check_stop 优先级/截断/spec 回退/停止摘除/Async 占位回扣）。所有 SUBTRACTED 分支均为与本章正交的特性（PRIORITY/encoder/pause/connector/约束解码/repetition/统计），未误删 must_keep。
